changeSet.author: sumicare
changeSet.sql: UPDATE package_tiers SET weekday_price = 5500, weekend_price = 5500 WHERE package_id = ( SELECT id FROM packages WHERE code = 'PKG_MASSAGE_COUPLE' AND organization_id = (SELECT id FROM organizations WHERE slug = 'lasema') );

changeSet.author: sumicare
changeSet.sql: UPDATE package_tiers SET weekday_price = 7500, weekend_price = 7500 WHERE package_id = ( SELECT id FROM packages WHERE code = 'PKG_LASEMA_COUPLE' AND organization_id = (SELECT id FROM organizations WHERE slug = 'lasema') );

changeSet.author: sumicare
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO package_tiers (package_id, service_id, weekday_price, weekend_price) SELECT p.id, s.id, 7500, 7500 FROM packages p JOIN services_catalogue s ON s.organization_id = p.organization_id WHERE p.code = 'PKG_LASEMA_COUPLE' AND p.organization_id = (SELECT id FROM organizations WHERE slug = 'lasema') AND s.code IN ('SALT_GLOW_SCRUB','MILK_BATH_SCRUB','DAEMIDI','THAI','VENTOSA','TANDEM') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM package_tiers pt2 WHERE pt2.package_id = p.id AND pt2.service_id = s.id );
